purpose: Metadata contract for captions, speaker notes, proof paths and delivery caveats.
captionRules: Use short English captions for video overlays.
Keep German or detailed explanation in presenter notes.
Do not claim production authentication, production compliance or final advice.
Do not claim real binary export generation from metadata-only proof.
Do not encode documentation panels into app UI.

example.captionShort: Advisor approval is human review, not client release.
example.captionLong: The advisor can approve the recommendation package, but client visibility still waits for compliance release.
presenterNotes: Use this clip to explain the core no-unapproved-advice rule.
Do not say the advisor released the recommendation.
example.overclaimRisk: Viewer may assume advisor approval releases to client.
example.caveat: Advisor approval remains internal until compliance release.
